l_graph: K2 (the only connected graph on 2 vertices)
application_note: Under GPI, a maximal matching of edges is selected; each matched edge is rewritten.

rules.name: Edge Sprouting (one-sided)
rules.description: R = P3 as star centered at 0. Fresh vertex 2 connects to vertex 0 (one interface vertex).
rules.effect: Matched edge u-v is kept. New pendant vertex w attached to u. One-sided sprouting.

rules.name: Edge Replacement (subdivision)
rules.description: R = P3 as star centered at 0. Interface maps to vertices 1,2. L-edge image (1,2) NOT in R → DELETED. Fresh vertex 0 connects to both interface vertices.
rules.effect: Matched edge u-v is REMOVED and replaced by fresh vertex w connected to both u and v. Subdivision: u-v becomes u-w-v. The only rule at this level that deletes an existing edge.

rules.name: Edge Sprouting (triangle completion)
rules.description: R = K3. Fresh vertex 2 connects to both interface vertices 0 and 1.
rules.effect: Matched edge u-v is kept, new vertex w attached to BOTH u and v, forming a triangle. Triangle completion.

verification: All 3 rules verified genuinely distinct by exhaustive isomorphism check over all (phi, psi) pairs. See reference/primo_diagnostic_v5.py and Paper 3 Section 3.
hierarchy_note: At signature 2→3, L=K2 is the only connected LHS, so all rules share the same LHS. Per-step priority between rules with identical LHS is vacuous: rule-set extension adds no power at this level (Paper 3, Section 1.2).
